original_statement: list the number of points scored by mario corso.
mutated_statement: do something the number of something by someone.
mutation_analysis: Verb replacement + Noun generalization + Entity anonymization + Event-verb deletion + Placeholder insertion: "list"→"do" | "points"→"something" | "scored"→(omitted) | "mario corso"→"someone" | extra "something" inserted after verb creating vagueness (list the number of points scored by mario corso → do something the number of something by someone)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从agent的judge_thought和simple_query可以看到其明确指出问题不完整与歧义，例如返回“Cannot determine”，并在thought中说明“问题不完整且未指定度量或人员，无法从表中确定单一数值”。Agent既没有给出具体数值也未盲猜，明确表示在缺少关键信息的情况下无法回答。该行为体现为识别并提示目标模糊性、拒绝随意推断，因而归入“意识到目标模糊，反问用户”类别（即识别模糊并要求或暗示需要更多信息）。
